spec.action_partition_description: single scheduled edge block selected by coupled SHA-256 threshold scores
spec.expected_compression_target: one expected-rate 1/36 contraction block plus base tier
spec.leakage_risk_statement: Uses only stable instance id, schema seed, selector rule id, and edge identities; it does not use rewards, terminal outcomes, learned values, or future episode results.
spec.state_partition_description: identity state keys; runtime contraction is edge-driven
